📄 Blank-Page Retrieval

The highest-yield active recall method. Write everything you know on a topic — no hints, no prompts — then compare against the model answer. This is what makes things actually stick.

✍️
Essays only ⭐ main
Philosophy + Economics combined — skip Maths

Narrow by paper / module
Theme-level: "Tell me everything about Oligopoly" — pulls in all related cards. Single: one sub at a time.
Focus hides all chrome. ESC to exit mid-session.

Essay Plans

Select a topic · plan your 25-marker · time yourself to 8 minutes

📝
Select a topic from the left to start your essay plan.

Calibration Audit

Compares your self-reported confidence scores against actual flashcard performance. Overconfidence is the #1 revision trap — this surfaces where your self-model is wrong.

How to read this: A negative gap means you claimed high confidence but performed poorly on cards — the most dangerous pattern before exams. A positive gap means you're better than you think. "N/A" means that topic has no flashcard session data yet.
Complete at least one flashcard session to see calibration data.

🔴 Mistake Journal

Every card you mark wrong is logged here. Add notes on why you got it wrong. Chronic mistakes (3+ times) are flagged in dark red.

🗂 Card Manager

Browse all flashcards. Edit any card's question or answer — your edits are saved locally and override the original. The original is always recoverable.

Question Topic / Subtopic Subject Actions
Edit Card
Question
Answer (HTML supported — bold, ul/li, etc.)
💡 Edits are saved in your browser's local storage and override the original card everywhere in the app. The original text is never deleted — you can always reset.

Every topic across all subjects, coloured by your confidence score. Red = critical gaps. Click any cell to jump to flashcards for that topic.

🧪 Topic Mini Tests

Build a 4–6 question mini-test on one topic. Sessions escalate from medium to hard and automatically pull in redo-due weak questions first.

💾 Export & Backup

Your revision data lives in localStorage. Export it regularly to avoid losing progress — one clear-site-data wipes everything.

📂 Restore from backup

⚠ Importing will overwrite your current data. Make sure you export first.
